senior.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
senior.note: STALLED 6+ days with no progress. Reassigned as primary this cycle. Implementation path clear: extend RawAgentAction with irreversible property, add ConfirmationRequired event kind to packages/events/src/schema.ts, hook packages/kernel/src/decision.ts, wire CLI prompt surface. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema already exists.

secondary.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
secondary.note: STALLED 6+ days with no progress. Reassigned as secondary this cycle. Start with design: browser.* action class vs shell.exec extension decision, URL scope invariant stub, pacing invariant definition. File design comment on issue #1384 before coding.
